# Generated MCP Artifacts

This directory contains build-time generated artifacts for the MCP server.

**Do not manually edit files in this directory.** They are generated by:

```bash
# Generate MCP manifest from SKILL.md files
npm run generate:mcp-manifest

# Validate manifest is up-to-date (CI)
npm run validate:mcp-manifest

# Validate all SKILL.md files
npm run validate:mcp-skills
```

## Files

- `mcp-manifest.json` — Deterministic snapshot of all skill vault metadata,
  built-in tool catalog, and category mappings. Used for:
  - Build-time validation (drift detection)
  - Documentation generation (managed blocks in rule files)
  - CI checks (freshness verification)
